title: koeleria spicata subsp. andina
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. andina, also known as Andean June grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Koeleria spicata subsp. andina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
